---
title: "Sritanya Suresh Andal"
subtitle: "MSc Business Analytics · Dublin City University"
pagetitle: "Sritanya Suresh Andal - Portfolio"
image: images/profile.svg
image-alt: "Portrait placeholder for Sritanya Suresh Andal"
description-meta: |
  Portfolio of Sritanya Suresh Andal - MSc Business Analytics at Dublin City University.
  Data, strategy, and the people behind every decision.
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 18em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sritanyasureshandal
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sritanya
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:sritanyaandalsuresh@gmail.com"
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: CV
      href: cv/SritanyaSureshAndal_CV.pdf
      target: _blank
toc: false
---

::: {.lede}
A people-first analyst who turns data into decisions - and decisions into outcomes that actually land with the humans on the receiving end.
:::

I am completing my **MSc in Business Analytics** at [Dublin City University](https://www.dcu.ie), with a background in Computer Applications and four years of student leadership across 6,000+ peers and 70+ events. My work sits at the intersection of **data, strategy, and people** - from building predictive models for fraud detection and HR analytics, to applying strategic frameworks (PESTLE, Porter's, TOWS, VUCA) to live business cases.

This portfolio collects my projects, my writing, and the arc of the year that is shaping what I do next.

[Explore projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}
[Read the blog](blog/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary role="button"}

## What I'm working on

::: {.metric-grid}
::: {.metric}
[70+]{.value}
[Events directed as SU VP]{.label}
:::

::: {.metric}
[6,000+]{.value}
[Students represented]{.label}
:::

::: {.metric}
[ROC-AUC 0.76]{.value}
[IBM HR attrition model]{.label}
:::

::: {.metric}
[5]{.value}
[DCU modules this semester]{.label}
:::
:::

## Focus areas

[Data & Analytics]{.pill} [Predictive ML]{.pill} [NLP]{.pill} [Power BI]{.pill} [SQL]{.pill} [Strategic Thinking]{.pill} [UX Research]{.pill} [Event Management]{.pill} [Stakeholder Communication]{.pill}
